features.name: User Authentication
features.description: JWT-based authentication with login and token management

features.name: Role-Based Access Control
features.description: User roles and permissions enforcement

features.name: Policy Creation
features.description: Create new insurance policies with complete details

features.name: Policy Retrieval
features.description: Get policy details by ID

features.name: Policy Update
features.description: Update existing policy information

features.name: Policy Search - Multi-criteria
features.description: Search policies by policy number, insured name, organization, type, location, SSN/TIN

features.name: Policy Search - Partial Matching
features.description: Support partial/fuzzy matching for names and addresses

features.name: SSN/TIN Masking
features.description: Mask SSN/TIN in responses showing only last 4 digits

features.name: SSN/TIN Encryption
features.description: Encrypt SSN/TIN at rest in database

features.name: Policy Details Display
features.description: Display complete policy information including vehicle, location, and coverage details

features.name: Search Results Pagination
features.description: Paginated policy search results with configurable page size

features.name: Claim Creation
features.description: Create new claims linked to policies

features.name: Claim Retrieval
features.description: Get claim details by ID

features.name: Claim Update
features.description: Update existing claim information

features.name: Claim Search
features.description: Search claims by claim number, policy, status, date range

features.name: Claim History by Policy
features.description: Get list of all claims for a specific policy

features.name: Claim History Sorting
features.description: Sort claims by loss date (most recent first)

features.name: Claim Status Filter
features.description: Filter claims by status (Open, Closed, Paid, Denied)

features.name: Claim-Level Policy Data
features.description: Add/edit policy information at claim level for unverified policies

features.name: Claim Policy Data Tracking
features.description: Track claim-level policy changes separately from original policy data

features.name: Injury Incident Details
features.description: Store and manage injury incident information

features.name: Coding Information
features.description: Store CPT/ICD coding information for claims

features.name: Carrier Involvement Tracking
features.description: Track other carrier information and involvement

features.name: Subrogation Referral
features.description: Refer claims to subrogation with tracking

features.name: Scheduled Payments Management
features.description: Manage scheduled payment information (type, amount, balance, recipient)

features.name: Payment Creation
features.description: Create new payments linked to claims and policies

features.name: Payment Retrieval
features.description: Get payment details by ID

features.name: Payment Update
features.description: Update pending/draft payment information

features.name: Payment Search
features.description: Search payments by number, claim, policy, status, method

features.name: Multiple Payment Methods
features.description: Support ACH, wire, credit/debit card, Stripe Connect, global payouts

features.name: Payment Void
features.description: Void payments with reason tracking

features.name: Payment Reversal
features.description: Reverse payments with reason tracking

features.name: Payment Reissue
features.description: Reissue void or reversed payments

features.name: Reserve Line Allocation
features.description: Allocate payments across multiple reserve lines

features.name: Eroding/Non-Eroding Designation
features.description: Designate payments as eroding or non-eroding against reserves

features.name: Tax Reporting
features.description: Mark payments as tax reportable and capture tax ID numbers

features.name: Tax ID Encryption
features.description: Encrypt tax ID numbers at rest

features.name: Multiple Payment Details
features.description: Add multiple payees/portions per payment (joint payees)

features.name: Payment Detail Management
features.description: Add and remove payment details/payees

features.name: Banking Information Storage
features.description: Store encrypted banking details for EFT/wire transfers

features.name: Payment Deductions
features.description: Support deductions with amounts and reasons

features.name: Positive/Negative/Zero Amounts
features.description: Allow payments with positive, negative, or zero amounts

features.name: Vendor Onboarding
features.description: Onboard vendors and claimants with contact information

features.name: KYC Verification
features.description: Track KYC/identity verification status for vendors

features.name: Payment Method Verification
features.description: Verify and store vendor payment methods

features.name: Password Hashing
features.description: Bcrypt-based password hashing

features.name: JWT Token Generation
features.description: Generate JWT access tokens with expiration

features.name: JWT Token Validation
features.description: Validate JWT tokens on protected endpoints

features.name: Sensitive Data Encryption
features.description: Fernet-based encryption for SSN/TIN and banking info

features.name: PCI-DSS Compliance
features.description: Encrypt payment data, no logging of sensitive info

features.name: Audit Trail Logging
features.description: Log all create/update/delete actions with user and timestamp

features.name: Change Tracking
features.description: Track field-level changes in audit logs

features.name: Immutable Audit Logs
features.description: Audit logs cannot be modified or deleted

features.name: Correlation ID Middleware
features.description: Generate and propagate correlation IDs for request tracing

features.name: Request Logging Middleware
features.description: Log all requests with method, path, status, duration

features.name: CORS Configuration
features.description: Configure CORS for allowed origins

features.name: Custom Exception Hierarchy
features.description: Typed exceptions for different error conditions

features.name: Global Exception Handler
features.description: Consistent error response format

features.name: Error Messages
features.description: User-friendly error messages per BRD requirements

features.name: Liveness Probe
features.description: Health check endpoint for app liveness

features.name: Readiness Probe
features.description: Health check endpoint including database connectivity

features.name: OpenAPI Documentation
features.description: Auto-generated API documentation at /docs

features.name: Pydantic Schemas
features.description: Request/response validation with Pydantic

features.name: Pagination Support
features.description: Consistent pagination across search endpoints

features.name: Environment Configuration
features.description: Pydantic Settings with environment variable support

features.name: Configuration Validation
features.description: Validate configuration on startup

features.name: Async SQLAlchemy
features.description: Async database operations with SQLAlchemy 2.0

features.name: Database Session Management
features.description: Per-request database sessions with dependency injection

features.name: Auto Table Creation
features.description: Automatic table creation in development mode
